calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Ownership Of Trust Property
Off Calendar Dec-13-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Richard Lund, via Zoom, for Walter Hirner, Petitioner.

The court acknowledges that there are no appearances to object to the instant petition and counsel advises that he is unaware of any objections. The court and counsel discuss as to why counsel did not file the instant in the existing trust case. Counsel reports regarding the reason for filing a new petition. The court advises counsel that it intends to take this matter under submission with the intent to grant it but reminds counsel to file any future petitions in case number PTR-19-302798 as this matter will be consolidated this matter with the case number previously referenced.

The Petition is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
